titleStmt.title: SII 18.198: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 198. (B.K. No. 131 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Pratāpachakravarti Jaitapāḷadēva and is dated in the 6th year of his reign Naḷa, Pushya s11u. 4, Wednesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa, corresponding regularly to A.D. 1196, December 25, Wednesday.

It records the gift of the income derived from certain taxes, made by Sēnādhipati Saṁkarasa-Daṇḍanāyaka and Karaṇa Kēsiyaṇayya-Nāyaka who were governing Tardavāḍi One thousand. The gift was made to god Nṛisiṁha of Vijayāpura (modern Bijāpur), which is described as Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīnṛsiṁhāya namaḥ . saṁpatsaṁbhavabhāvanaḥ pariharandōṣānaśē
ṣānnadā padmāsadmanijōdaraḥ parijayadrājīvanētraścayaḥ . rakṣa
ssakṣayakārakōditisutavrātābdhivṛddhau vadhuḥ śaśvaphrīvijayāphura
dvijajanaṁ pāyāṁnṛsiṁhō mudā . © ssasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmatu yā
davanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti jaitapāḷadēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarapra
varddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . tatupādapadmōpajīvi . parijitaraṇa raṁgaścāru
valgatturaṁgaḥ pragatasakaḷabhaṁgaḥ śatrulakṣmībhujaṁgaḥ . gaḷitasakaḷapāpastuṣṭajaitāvanīpō
jayati madanarūpō jaitasiṁhō mahīpaḥ . tatupādapadmōpajīvi . śrīśaṁkara camūnāthabhā
nuḥ pāyādbhuvaṁ sthiraṁ . yatkāṁtakarasaṁparkkādvikāsi jagadaṁbujuṁ . svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ
śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati saṁkarasadaṁḍanāyakaru karaṇaṁ kēsiyaṇayya nāyaka
ruṁ tarddavāḍi sāyiramaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdāḷuttamirddu . svasti śrīmatu
yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti jaitapāḷadēvavarṣada 6 neya naḷasaṁvatsarada puṣya śu
dhdhaḷa budhavāra byatīpāta Uttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇada devasa śrīmaddakṣiṇa vāraṇāsi
vijayāpurada śrīnṛsiṁhadēvargge Ā dēvarāḷkeya sarbbanamasyada hosahaḷḷiya A
dhikārigaḷa kāṇikehodakeyaṁ taḷavṛttiya heggaḍeya kāṇikeyaṁ taḷāṟagāṇike
yaṁ baṇṇigeyaṁ grāmapaṁcakamaṁ beḷḷāyamaṁ yiṁtiUmukhyavāgi sakaḷa tribhōgamaṁ
Ā dēvargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭaru . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī . svadattāṁ parada ttāṁ vvā
yō harēta vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 18.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
